basic_details.job_title: RRB NTPC Undergraduate Exam Date 2026 Out @ rrbcdg.gov.in – Check CBT Schedule & Full Details
basic_details.short_information: RRB NTPC Undergraduate Exam Date 2026: The Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) has officially released the exam date for the NTPC Undergraduate recruitment under CEN 07/2025. Candidates who have applied for the Undergraduate level posts can check the complete exam schedule below. The CBT-1 examination is scheduled to be held from 7th May to 21st June 2026 (specifically on 7th, 8th, 9th May and 13th, 14th, 16th to 21st June 2026). All eligible candidates are advised to download their admit cards and prepare accordingly.

important_dates.raw: RRB NTPC Undergraduate Exam Date 2026: The Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) has officially released the exam date for the NTPC Undergraduate recruitment under CEN 07/2025. Candidates who have applied for the Undergraduate level posts can check the complete exam schedule below. The CBT-1 examination is scheduled to be held from 7th May to 21st June 2026 (specifically on 7th, 8th, 9th May and 13th, 14th, 16th to 21st June 2026). All eligible candidates are advised to download their admit cards and prepare accordingly. | Latest Update: RRB has announced the exam date for NTPC Undergraduate positions. The CBT-1 examination will be conducted from 7th May to 21st June 2026 at various centers across India. Candidates can download the exam date notification from the official RRB websites. | Quick Link: Download RRB NTPC Undergraduate Exam Date Notification 2026 | Key Highlights - RRB NTPC Undergraduate Exam Date 2026 Organization: Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) Post Name: NTPC Undergraduate (Various Posts like Junior Clerk cum Typist, Accounts Clerk cum Typist, Trains Clerk, Commercial cum Ticket Clerk) Exam Date: 7th, 8th, 9th May 2026 and 13th, 14th, 16th to 21st June 2026 (CBT-1) Exam Mode: Online Computer Based Test (CBT) Official Website: www.rrbcdg.gov.in (and respective RRB regional websites) Admit Card Release: 4 days before the respective exam date (City Intimation Slip 10 days before)

exam_pattern.details: Understanding the exam pattern is crucial for effective preparation. Here's what candidates need to know about the RRB NTPC Undergraduate examination: | Exam Mode: Online Computer Based Test (CBT) Total Marks: 100 Number of Questions: 100 Duration: 90 Minutes Negative Marking: Yes (1/3rd mark deducted for each wrong answer) Subjects/Sections: General Awareness (40 Qs/40 Marks), Mathematics (30 Qs/30 Marks), General Intelligence and Reasoning (30 Qs/30 Marks)

faq.question: Q1. When is the RRB NTPC Undergraduate exam scheduled for 2026?
faq.answer: The CBT-1 examination is scheduled from 7th May to 21st June 2026 (specific dates: 7th, 8th, 9th May and 13th to 21st June excluding 15th). Candidates can check the official notification for complete details.

faq.question: Q2. Where can I download the RRB NTPC Undergraduate exam date notification?
faq.answer: You can download the notification from the official website www.rrbcdg.gov.in or respective RRB regional websites.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any change in the RRB NTPC Undergraduate exam date 2026?
faq.answer: As per the latest notification, the exam is scheduled as announced. Any changes will be updated on the official website and our portal.

faq.question: Q4. When will the RRB NTPC Undergraduate admit card be released?
faq.answer: The admit card is expected to be released 4 days before the examination date. Keep checking the official website regularly.

faq.question: Q5. What is the exam mode for RRB NTPC Undergraduate 2026?
faq.answer: The examination will be conducted in Online Computer Based Test (CBT) mode.
